headline: Friday window: inspect peas and snap garlic scapes
weather_notes: Today's 60% storm chance washes off any Bt immediately — hold pest treatments until Friday.
Friday clears to 65°F and sunny — best garden work window before Saturday night's 73% storm.
Overnight lows of 38–40°F through Friday pose no frost risk to peas or garlic.
Saturday night's 73% precip chance means any Bt applied Friday has just one day to work — don't wait.

surfaced_tasks.title: Check hardneck garlic for scapes
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due Saturday and late April is the prime emergence window in Zone 7b — snap before they curl fully or bulb size is lost.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for aphids — apply Bt if caterpillars present
surfaced_tasks.reason: Peas are 10 days from expected harvest; Friday's dry window is the last chance to apply Bt before Saturday night's heavy rain.
